query:
UPDATE torrents
             SET seeders = (
                     SELECT COUNT(*)
                     FROM peers
                     WHERE peers.torrent_id = torrents.id
                       AND peers.seeder = true
                       AND peers.active = true
                 ),
                 leechers = (
                     SELECT COUNT(*)
                     FROM peers
                     WHERE peers.torrent_id = torrents.id
                       AND peers.seeder = false
                       AND peers.active = true
                 )
